'Walk Out of a Meeting'—Elon Musk's Rule That Defines Billionaire Success "Walk out of a meeting or drop off a call as soon as it is obvious you aren't adding value," Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk once wrote in a company-wide email in 2018. "It is not rude to leave; it is rude to make someone stay and waste their time." The line reflects a broader billionaire mindset: ambitious, efficient, and unafraid to break norms. NetApp Accelerates VMware Migrations with Amazon Elastic VMware Service Integration SAN JOSE, Calif., August 06, 2025--NetApp® (NASDAQ: NTAP), the intelligent data infrastructure company, today announced that Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP® is now a supported external storage option for Amazon Elastic VMware Service (Amazon EVS) on Amazon Web Services (AWS). Amazon EVS, now generally available, is a new AWS service that allows users to run VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) directly within their Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (Amazon VPC), alongside other applications.
